name: system_health
description: Automator audits → Scholar prioritizes → fix highest priority issue

nodes.prompt_template: Run full system health check: disk, memory, services, docker, git status, failed units, swap usage. Report everything.
nodes.label: System Audit

nodes.prompt_template:
Prioritize these system issues by severity. List the top 3 fixes needed:
{audit}
nodes.label: Prioritize Issues

nodes.prompt_template:
Fix the #1 highest priority issue identified here:
{analyze}
nodes.label: Auto-Fix
